text:
is a member of the Titan Junior High Cooking Club.

Appearance

Nanaba has blue eyes and short blonde hair styled in an undercut with bangs parted in the middle. When she is doing her club activities, she wears a green apron over her school uniform.

Story

Nanaba, along with Gelgar, scolds Sasha for eating the cooking club supplies and rejects her candidature.
